task_description: Rewrite dashboard-builder.ts to produce HTML output matching the reference dashboard at dash.shopinzo.bond, with gzip+base64 data payload, full CSS design system, charts, filters, tables, modals, and client-side JS. Then deploy and test.

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles cleanly (no source file errors). All 69 existing tests pass. Docker compose build completed on VPS. Test run triggered (ID: cmqysmf0900005xb1s5erbuvr). Output HTML is 35.5KB (under 60KB limit), contains all required elements: PAY constant with gzip+base64 data, CSS design system with correct variables, DM Mono font, scanline effect, sticky header, 6 KPI cards, 14 analytics charts, Lead Explorer with sortable/filterable/paged table, detail modal, DASHBOARD_DATA_API polling.
